📅 Date Calculator

Calculate the exact number of days, weeks and months between any two dates instantly.

Enter the two dates

Common date calculations

What is a date calculator?

A date calculator finds the exact difference between two dates in days, weeks and months. It is useful for project deadlines, counting down to events, calculating age, finding payment due dates and any situation where you need to know how many days are between two dates.

Frequently asked questions

Does it account for leap years?

Yes, the calculation is exact and automatically handles leap years in any date range.

What are working days?

Working days are Monday through Friday, excluding weekends. This calculator does not account for public holidays as these vary by country.

Can I calculate dates in the past?

Yes. Enter the earlier date as the start date to calculate how many days have passed since then.
